name: Market Investigation
when_to_use: Size demand, growth, segments, timing, structure for this opportunity.

name: Customer Investigation
when_to_use: Jobs-to-be-done, pain severity, stated-vs-revealed evidence, willingness to pay.

name: Competitive Investigation
when_to_use: Direct competitors, substitutes, do-nothing alternative, differentiation, moats.

name: Domain Investigation
when_to_use: Glossary, actors, workflows, unwritten rules, edge cases, incentives.

name: Technical Investigation
when_to_use: Feasibility, architecture options, integration, build-vs-buy, scale, security, maintainability.

name: Data Investigation
when_to_use: Data sources, access, ownership, quality, freshness, labels, governance, instrumentation gaps.

name: Operational Investigation
when_to_use: Delivery, support, escalation, runbooks, staffing, vendor ops, monitoring, failure modes.

name: Financial Investigation
when_to_use: Revenue/pricing model, COGS, CAC, LTV, gross margin, payback, scenarios.

name: Legal Investigation
when_to_use: Entity, IP, licensing, privacy (GDPR/CCPA), compliance (SOC2/HIPAA/PCI), advertising claims, employment, tax. Escalation inventory, not legal advice.

name: Channel Investigation
when_to_use: Discovery channels, channel/segment fit, channel economics, platform risk, funnel friction.

name: GTM Investigation
when_to_use: Segment sequencing, positioning, messaging, packaging, sales motion, onboarding, activation, proof.

name: Stakeholder Investigation
when_to_use: Users / buyers / approvers / champions / blockers; incentives, power, procurement path.

name: Risk Investigation
when_to_use: Assumption, market, execution, technical, operational, financial, legal, platform, fraud, reputation, concentration risks. Severity × likelihood + kill criteria.

name: Trend Investigation
when_to_use: Tech, customer-behavior, regulatory, competitive, macro, platform shifts. Tailwinds, threats, timing bets.

name: All In-Scope Areas
when_to_use: Fan out one sub-agent per in-scope surface (use scope output to pick the subset).
